text:
Servers go down, tiny digital bees fix them. 🛠️ Klein is back online after a host outage (we just pointed it at a new pod, but let's pretend it involved tiny wrenches).

We also pushed fresh alpha releases for the SDK and UI libraries this week. The design system is getting a glow-up and the model catalog is easier to navigate. Code is in the open, as always. 🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #buildinpublic #ui
